profile.name: Muhammad Awais
profile.title: Mobile App Developer
profile.subtitle: Android • Kotlin Multiplatform • Compose Multiplatform • Flutter
profile.bio: Mobile developer with 4+ years shipping production apps. Specialized in Android native, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Compose Multiplatform (CMP), and Flutter. Building scalable, maintainable cross-platform systems with clean architecture.

projects.title: Spectra Care App
projects.summary: Telehealth app with Jetpack Compose, Agora video SDK, and IoT health monitoring.
projects.description: Premium Android Native telehealth app built with Jetpack Compose — integrating Agora SDK video calling, Spectra SDK for 6-in-1 IoT health monitors, appointments, and lab tests.
projects.altText: Spectra Care — Android Native telehealth app with Agora video calling and Spectra IoT health monitor integration, built by Senior Android Developer Muhammad Awais

projects.title: Zouris: Holistic Wellness Platform
projects.summary: Cross-platform meditation app built with Compose Multiplatform, shipping iOS and Android from one codebase.
projects.description: Zouris is a holistic wellness platform engineered using Compose Multiplatform (KMP) where certified coaches, counselors, and wellness practitioners share guided sessions, meditations, and affirmations across iOS and Android.
projects.altText: Zouris wellness coaching app — cross-platform meditation and coaching UI shared across iOS and Android using Compose Multiplatform

projects.title: Egora B2B: Restaurant Partner Platform
projects.summary: White-labeled KMP dashboard for restaurant owners to manage orders, pick-ups, and native table reservations.
projects.description: White-labeled B2B counterpart of the Egora ecosystem. Built using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), it empowers restaurant owners on both Android & iOS to independently manage dine-in, pickup, reservations, and QR code ordering operations with full native payment integration.
projects.altText: Egora B2B restaurant partner dashboard — white-labeled order, reservation and QR ordering management built with a shared KMP codebase

projects.title: Egora: Smart Restaurant Ecosystem
projects.summary: Smart restaurant app with QR ordering, dine-in, and reservation management via shared KMP core.
projects.description: Comprehensive Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) restaurant management app streamlining dine-in, pickup, and reservation flows across platforms. Features unified QR code ordering logic and secure native payment gateway integrations for a seamless dining experience.
projects.altText: Egora restaurant ecosystem app — QR ordering, dine-in and pickup flows powered by a shared multiplatform business logic layer

projects.title: Makernote: Multiplatform EdTech
projects.summary: Educational platform with real-time collaboration built with KMP and Firebase.
projects.description: High-performance educational app for teachers and students — built with Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for seamless native iOS and Android delivery with real-time multiplatform collaboration features.
projects.altText: Makernote EdTech app for teachers and students — real-time collaboration built with MVI architecture on Kotlin Multiplatform

projects.title: Eco Grocery: Smart Inventory & Recipes
projects.summary: Smart grocery tracker with barcode scanning, recipe recommendations, and expiry tracking.
projects.description: Intelligent Android grocery management app featuring a dynamic to-buy list linked to a recipe recommendation engine, plus a built-in barcode scanner for real-time nutritional tracking and expiry management.
projects.altText: Eco Grocery Android app — barcode-scanning grocery tracker with recipe recommendations and expiry alerts

projects.title: HCloud: Clinic Management Suite
projects.summary: Enterprise-grade operations portal for doctor clinics built with Clean Architecture.
projects.description: Enterprise-grade clinic operations platform serving thousands of healthcare providers with real-time prescription sync and smart appointment scheduling.
projects.altText: HCloud clinic management suite — real-time prescription sync and appointment scheduling for healthcare providers

projects.title: Healthwire: HealthTech Platform
projects.summary: Leading healthcare app with pharmacy logistics, lab booking, and telemedicine.
projects.description: Architected Pakistan's leading healthcare app — optimizing pharmacy logistics, lab-test booking, and telemedicine for thousands of daily active users.
projects.altText: Healthwire healthcare app — pharmacy logistics, lab test booking and telemedicine built with Jetpack Compose

projects.title: DonGamers: E-Sports Platform
projects.summary: Gaming tournament platform featuring robust real-time chats, brackets, and interactive custom animations.
projects.description: Built a global gaming community platform with real-time chat, tournament brackets, and Unity-powered interactive features — handling thousands of concurrent sessions.
projects.altText: DonGamers e-sports community platform — real-time tournament chat built with Socket.IO on Android

experiences.description: Leading Android and KMP development for multiple products. Architecting scalable solutions with Clean Architecture principles.
achievements: Shipped 3 production apps across Android and KMP

experiences.description: Developed and maintained healthcare applications with millions of users. Focused on performance optimization and reliability.
Started career building native Android applications. Learned fundamentals of app development and SOLID principles.

services.title: Android Native Development
services.description: High-performance native Android apps with Jetpack Compose, Material Design 3, and modern Android practices.

services.title: Kotlin Multiplatform
services.description: Cross-platform development with KMP and CMP, sharing business logic across Android and iOS.

services.title: Flutter Development
services.description: Fast-moving cross-platform apps with Flutter, ideal for MVP and rapid prototyping.

services.title: App Architecture & Optimization
services.description: Designing scalable, maintainable architectures following Clean Architecture and SOLID principles.

testimonials.message: Working with Awais was a great experience. He optimized our application, reduced its RAM usage, and improved performance by 30%. His expertise in code optimization and shared architectures made a noticeable impact on our product quality.

Awais did great work on our app. His attention to detail, clean architecture, and focus on solid, maintainable code made the entire development process smooth from start to finish. Highly recommended for any serious Android or Kotlin Multiplatform project.

Awais built our Eco Grocery app end-to-end, from the barcode scanner to the recipe recommendation engine. The app runs smoothly, the architecture is clean, and it has genuinely improved how our users manage their groceries and expiry tracking.

Awais delivered an outstanding telehealth app for our hospital, integrating video consultations and IoT health monitor data reliably. Our patients and doctors both rely on the app daily, and it has held up flawlessly under real-world clinical use.
